    G

    get(Class<T>) - Static method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.core.services.ServiceLocator
    Retrieves a registered service by its class type.
    getBallArea() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.SensorCache
    Gets the area of the last detected ball.
    getBallColor() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.SensorCache
    Gets the color of the last detected ball.
    getBallX() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.SensorCache
    Gets the x-coordinate of the last detected ball.
    getBallY() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.SensorCache
    Gets the y-coordinate of the last detected ball.
    getColorObjectFromCamera() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Gets the color of an object detected by the camera.
    getColorObjectFromCamera(boolean) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Gets the color of an object detected by the camera.
    getData() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.protocol.JsonResponse
    Retrieves the data payload from the response.
    getData() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.protocol.JsonResponse.Payload
    Gets the data payload as a JsonNode.
    getDistance() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.SensorCache
    Gets the last known distance from the ultrasonic sensor.
    getErrorCode() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.protocol.JsonResponse
    Retrieves the error code from the response payload.
    getErrorCode() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.protocol.JsonResponse.Payload
    Gets the error code, if the status is "ERROR".
    getLabelFromCamera() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Gets the labels of objects detected by the camera.
    getLabelFromCamera(boolean) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Gets the labels of objects detected by the camera.
    getLineOffset() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.SensorCache
    Gets the last known offset from the line sensor.
    getLineStatus() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.SensorCache
    Gets the last known status from the line sensor.
    getMessage() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.protocol.JsonResponse
    Retrieves the message from the response payload.
    getMessage() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.protocol.JsonResponse.Payload
    Gets the message associated with the payload.
    getPort() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.TelemetryListener
    Gets the port this listener is running on.
    getStatus() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.protocol.JsonResponse.Payload
    Gets the status of the payload (e.g., "OK", "ERROR").
